mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tulip.users (email, password, username, role, status) VALUES (#{email}, #{password}, #{username}, COALESCE(#{role}, 'USER'), COALESCE(#{status}, 'ACTIVE'))
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM tulip.users WHERE email = #{email}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM tulip.users WHERE username = #{username}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tulip.user_profiles (user_id, full_name, phone) VALUES (#{userId}, #{fullName}, #{phone})
mapper.update: UPDATE tulip.users SET updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
